steps.title: Set up the equation from the given information
steps.content: Let p be the original price per shirt. Raheem bought 9 shirts at this price, so the original total cost is 9p dollars. After applying a \$54 coupon, the final cost was \$108. This translates to the equation: $$9p - 54 = 108$$

steps.title: Solve for the price per shirt
steps.content:
Add 54 to both sides:
$$9p = 162$$
Divide both sides by 9:
$$p = \frac{162}{9} = 18$$
Therefore, the original price for 1 shirt was \$18.
